tasks.title: Inventory current mappings and vocabulary sources
tasks.goal: Build a ranked source inventory from docs/vocabulary and existing mapping files without treating polluted mappings as authoritative truth.
actions: Parse docs/vocabulary TOPIK_1000, TOPIK_2000, TOPIK_3000, and TOPIK_I lists into one ranked lexicon table.
Extract POS hints from content/mappings/*.json as legacy seed data only.
Identify duplicate surfaces, inflected-only entries, and likely polluted rows for quarantine.
acceptance: Every surfaced lemma carries a rank band and source reference.
Legacy mapping data is never used as the authoritative source during inventory.

tasks.title: Define base, extension, tail, and quarantine policy
tasks.goal: Split dictionary governance into clean production layers so base mapping cannot be polluted by low-frequency or incorrect rows.
actions: Define quarantine criteria for wrong splits, wrong POS, and uncertain canonicalization.
Define how dual-POS surfaces are allowed to coexist without overwriting each other.
acceptance: Base mapping and extension mapping are explicitly separated.
Quarantined items are excluded from production dictionaries.

tasks.title: Derive POS assignment rules from current seeds
tasks.goal: Use existing mapping files only as POS seeds, then normalize them into a controlled POS routing matrix.
actions: Map existing ko:n / ko:v / ko:adj / ko:adv / ko:pron / ko:p / ko:e / ko:cop / ko:det / ko:intj / ko:xnum / ko:count tags into the new layer policy.
Flag lemma/base-form entries versus functional-token entries.
Mark known conflicts and polysemy cases for manual review.
acceptance: POS hints are traceable back to seed mappings.
Conflicting POS cases are separated from the clean production layers.

tasks.title: Build clean base dictionary for rank band 1-1000
tasks.goal: Generate the production base dictionary from the common-frequency band only.
actions: Create clean base mapping files split by POS.
Write only verified 1-1000 items into the base layer.
Keep composite atoms decomposed into their component canonical entries.
acceptance: No polluted or low-frequency rows appear in the base dictionary.
Base files remain stable under rerun with the same source snapshot.

tasks.title: Build extension dictionary and quarantine outputs for rank band 1001-2000
tasks.goal: Store mid-frequency items in a separate extension layer and keep uncertain rows out of production.
actions: Create clean extension mapping files split by POS.
Move questionable or conflicting rows into quarantine outputs instead of forcing them into base.
Preserve source provenance for every extension entry.
acceptance: Extension items do not contaminate base mapping files.
Quarantined rows are explicitly separated and reviewable.

tasks.title: Validate layered dictionaries against XknpI48lT-g atoms
tasks.goal: Re-run the audit against the layered dictionary design and confirm the polluted rows are isolated instead of merged back into base.
actions: Re-check XknpI48lT-g_atoms.json against the new layered mappings.
Verify composite atoms component-by-component and file-by-file.
Confirm remaining mismatches are either real gaps or quarantined cases.
acceptance: Validation distinguishes base hits, extension hits, and quarantined misses.
The audit demonstrates that polluted rows are not written back into the base dictionary.
